properties.displayName: Fortigate - 不審なアウトバウンド通信 (レアポート)
properties.description: 内部ホストから一般的でないポートへのアウトバウンド通信を検出します。C2 (Command & Control) 通信やバックドア通信の兆候を示す可能性があります。
properties.query:
let CommonPorts = dynamic([80, 443, 53, 25, 110, 143, 993, 995, 587, 465, 22, 21, 123, 389, 636, 88, 445, 3389, 8080, 8443]);
let KnownInternalRanges = dynamic(["10.", "172.16.", "172.17.", "172.18.", "172.19.", "172.20.", "172.21.", "172.22.", "172.23.", "172.24.", "172.25.", "172.26.", "172.27.", "172.28.", "172.29.", "172.30.", "172.31.", "192.168."]);
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet"
| where DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where DeviceAction == "accept" or DeviceAction == "allow" or DeviceAction == "passthrough"
| where isnotempty(DestinationPort)
| where DestinationPort !in (CommonPorts)
| where DestinationPort >= 1
| extend IsInternalDest = iff(DestinationIP has_any (KnownInternalRanges), true, false)
| where IsInternalDest == false
| summarize
    ConnectionCount = count(),
    DistinctDestIPs = dcount(DestinationIP),
    DestinationIPs = make_set(DestinationIP, 10),
    SentBytesTotal = sum(SentBytes),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by SourceIP, DestinationPort, DeviceName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where ConnectionCount >= 3
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    SourceIP,
    DestinationPort,
    ConnectionCount,
    DistinctDestIPs,
    DestinationIPs,
    SentBytesTotal,
    DeviceName,
    FirstSeen,
    LastSeen
